## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (all data files valid against the schema)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New/updated entries have a unique kebab-case `id`, at least one `source`, and today's `last_reviewed`
- [ ] **No copyrighted text** — all guidance is paraphrased; standards referenced by name/clause only
- [ ] GCC angle included where relevant (`gcc_note` / `gcc_context`)
- [ ] `safety_notes` added for any hazardous fault (electrical, refrigerant, confined-space, pressure)
